issues: Potential keyword cannibalization between pages with overlapping titles (e.g., /solar-panel-calculator and /home-solar-panel-calculator both target 'costs & savings' intent).
Missing FAQPage structured data on /solar-panel-calculator which contains 3 FAQs.
Title tags on some pages exceed 60 characters (e.g., /solar-panel-calculator title is 62 characters).
optimizations: Differentiate page titles to target distinct search intents (e.g., 'How Many Panels' vs 'Cost Calculator' vs 'Savings Calculator') and avoid overlap.
Add FAQPage JSON-LD schema to any page that includes an FAQ section.
Keep title tags between 50-60 characters; trim to improve readability and ensure full display in SERPs.
Ensure each page has a unique meta description and H1 tag that matches the user intent.
Review internal linking to form clear topic clusters and avoid orphan pages.
